header.title: CoTel pricing

free.name: Free
free.description: To get started with the service

features.history_days: Chat history analysis for queries up to 5 days
features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every 3 hours

features.history_days: Chat history analysis for queries up to 30 days
features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every hour

features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every 15 minutes

notes.requests_text: Tokens are CoTel's internal currency. Every chat or channel analysis, as well as each subscription check, spends tokens depending on the volume and depth of processing. Each month your plan grants a fixed token allowance; on paid plans you can buy additional token packages, and any unused purchased tokens don't expire.
notes.subscriptions_text: A subscription is a periodic AI analysis of new messages in a chosen chat or channel for a given topic, followed by a Telegram notification.
notes.important_text: MVP pricing may be adjusted after launch once real workload and cost data become available.

success_modal.text: Enjoy a pleasant and productive experience with CoTel!

errors.load_plan_failed: Failed to load the current plan.
